auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Keyword.com API token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Create an account and retrieve the token under Settings > Account: https://app.keyword.com/settings/account

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the current Keyword.com user profile for the API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving the current Keyword.com user.

type.description: The user resource type returned by Keyword.com.

id.description: The user identifier returned by Keyword.com.

attributes.description: The user profile and subscription attributes returned by Keyword.com.

raw.description: The raw user resource returned by Keyword.com.

actions.name: get_keyword
actions.description: Get one Keyword.com keyword and its ranking data by project and keyword ID.

projectName.description: The Keyword.com project or group name. Use the full `[sub]` convention for subprojects.

date.description: The ranking data date to retrieve in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Keyword.com keyword.

type.description: The resource type returned by Keyword.com.

id.description: The keyword identifier returned by Keyword.com.

attributes.description: The keyword attributes and ranking metrics returned by Keyword.com.

raw.description: The raw keyword resource returned by Keyword.com.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Keyword.com keyword.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get one Keyword.com project or group by name.

projectName.description: The Keyword.com project or group name. Use the full `[sub]` convention for subprojects.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Keyword.com project.

type.description: The resource type returned by Keyword.com.

id.description: The project or group identifier returned by Keyword.com.

attributes.description: The project or group attributes returned by Keyword.com.

raw.description: The raw project or group resource returned by Keyword.com.

project.description: A Keyword.com project or group resource.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Keyword.com project.

actions.name: list_keywords
actions.description: List Keyword.com keywords and ranking data for a project or group.

projectName.description: The Keyword.com project or group name. Use the full `[sub]` convention for subprojects.

page.description: The page number for a paginated Keyword.com response.

perPage.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

date.description: The ranking data date to retrieve in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Keyword.com keywords.

type.description: The resource type returned by Keyword.com.

id.description: The keyword identifier returned by Keyword.com.

attributes.description: The keyword attributes and ranking metrics returned by Keyword.com.

raw.description: The raw keyword resource returned by Keyword.com.

anyOf.description: The metadata object returned by Keyword.com.
The pagination links returned by Keyword.com.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Keyword.com keywords.

actions.name: list_project_regions
actions.description: List Google regions tracked by a Keyword.com project or group.

projectName.description: The Keyword.com project or group name. Use the full `[sub]` convention for subprojects.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Keyword.com project regions.

region.description: The Google region domain returned by Keyword.com.

anyOf.description: The language code returned by Keyword.com.
The tracking type returned by Keyword.com.
The number of keywords tracked for this region.

raw.description: The raw region object returned by Keyword.com.

items.description: A Google region tracked in a Keyword.com project.

regions.description: The tracked regions returned by Keyword.com.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Keyword.com project regions.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: List active Keyword.com projects and groups visible to the API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Keyword.com projects.

type.description: The resource type returned by Keyword.com.

id.description: The project or group identifier returned by Keyword.com.

attributes.description: The project or group attributes returned by Keyword.com.

raw.description: The raw project or group resource returned by Keyword.com.

items.description: A Keyword.com project or group resource.

projects.description: The projects and groups returned by Keyword.com.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Keyword.com projects.
